sentences.text: I would like to open a savings account that offers a good interest rate.
sentences.translation_zh: 我想开一个利率好的储蓄账户。
sentences.translation_vi: Toi muon mo mot tai khoan tiet kiem co lai suat tot.

sentences.text: Could you tell me what the minimum balance requirement is for this account?
sentences.translation_zh: 你能告诉我这个账户的最低余额要求是多少吗？
sentences.translation_vi: Ban co the cho toi biet so du toi thieu cua tai khoan nay la bao nhieu?

sentences.text: If you transfer money online, the transaction will be processed within one business day.
sentences.translation_zh: 如果你在网上转账，交易将在一个工作日内处理完毕。
sentences.translation_vi: Neu ban chuyen tien truc tuyen, giao dich se duoc xu ly trong mot ngay lam viec.

sentences.text: The bank informed me that my credit card application had been approved.
sentences.translation_zh: 银行通知我信用卡申请已经获得批准了。
sentences.translation_vi: Ngan hang thong bao cho toi rang don xin the tin dung da duoc chap thuan.

sentences.text: Unless you set up automatic payments, you might forget to pay the bill on time.
sentences.translation_zh: 除非你设置了自动付款，否则你可能会忘记按时付账。
sentences.translation_vi: Tru khi ban cai dat thanh toan tu dong, ban co the quen tra hoa don dung han.

sentences.text: I noticed that someone had made an unauthorized withdrawal from my account.
sentences.translation_zh: 我注意到有人从我的账户中进行了未授权的取款。
sentences.translation_vi: Toi nhan thay co nguoi da rut tien trai phep tu tai khoan cua toi.

sentences.text: The teller explained that I needed two forms of identification to open the account.
sentences.translation_zh: 柜员解释说我需要两种身份证明才能开户。
sentences.translation_vi: Nhan vien giao dich giai thich rang toi can hai loai giay to tuy than de mo tai khoan.

sentences.text: Although the loan has a low interest rate, the repayment period is quite short.
sentences.translation_zh: 虽然贷款利率很低，但还款期限相当短。
sentences.translation_vi: Mac du khoan vay co lai suat thap, nhung thoi han tra no kha ngan.

sentences.text: You should report it immediately if you suspect that your card has been stolen.
sentences.translation_zh: 如果你怀疑你的卡被盗了，应该立即报告。
sentences.translation_vi: Ban nen bao cao ngay lap tuc neu ban nghi the cua ban bi danh cap.

sentences.text: I have been saving money for three years so that I can buy a house.
sentences.translation_zh: 我已经存了三年的钱，这样我就可以买房子了。
sentences.translation_vi: Toi da tiet kiem tien ba nam de co the mua nha.

sentences.text: When I checked my statement, I found that the charges were incorrect.
sentences.translation_zh: 当我查看账单时，我发现收费有误。
sentences.translation_vi: Khi toi kiem tra sao ke, toi phat hien cac khoan phi khong dung.

sentences.text: The bank will charge you a fee if your account balance falls below the minimum.
sentences.translation_zh: 如果你的账户余额低于最低限额，银行会收取费用。
sentences.translation_vi: Ngan hang se thu phi neu so du tai khoan cua ban giam xuong duoi muc toi thieu.

sentences.text: I would like to apply for a mortgage because we are planning to buy a new home.
sentences.translation_zh: 我想申请抵押贷款，因为我们计划买一套新房子。
sentences.translation_vi: Toi muon nop don vay the chap vi chung toi dang co ke hoach mua nha moi.

sentences.text: Please make sure that you sign at the bottom of every page.
sentences.translation_zh: 请确保您在每一页的底部签名。
sentences.translation_vi: Vui long dam bao ban ky ten o cuoi moi trang.

sentences.text: Once you have deposited the check, the funds will be available in two days.
sentences.translation_zh: 一旦你存入支票，资金将在两天内到账。
sentences.translation_vi: Khi ban da nop sec, tien se co san trong hai ngay.
